rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §21.407, which governs coercion of teachers regarding group membership and political participation.
quote: A school district board of trustees or school district employee may not directly or indirectly require or coerce any teacher to join any group, club, committee, organization, or association.
_note: No overlap between proposed tax exemption change and this education provision.
